name: safe-docx
description: Format-preserving Word document editing using atomic node operations - never corrupts your .docx files
long_description:
Safe Docx enables Claude to edit Microsoft Word documents (.docx) using atomic node operations that preserve all formatting - bold, italic, underline, styles, and structure. Unlike direct XML manipulation, Safe Docx operates on document nodes individually, ensuring edits never corrupt your files.

Why Safe Docx?
- Atomic operations: Each edit targets specific nodes, not raw XML strings
- Format preservation: Bold, italic, fonts, and styles survive every edit
- Stable paragraph IDs: Bookmarks (jr_para_*) provide reliable targeting across sessions
- Predictable results: What you edit is exactly what changes - nothing more

Key features:
- Open any .docx file from your local filesystem
- Search for text with grep (supports regex)
- Edit specific paragraphs with smart_edit (preserves formatting)
- Insert new paragraphs with smart_insert (copies formatting from anchor)
- Save edited documents back to your filesystem

Perfect for contracts, NDAs, agreements, and any Word documents where formatting integrity matters.

tools.name: open_document
tools.description: Open a Word document (.docx) for editing. Provide the local file path. Read-only operation.

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read document content with stable paragraph IDs (jr_para_*) for precise editing. Read-only operation.

tools.name: grep
tools.description: Search for text patterns in the document. Returns paragraph IDs for matches. Read-only operation.

tools.name: smart_edit
tools.description: Replace text in a specific paragraph while preserving all formatting. Modifies document.

tools.name: smart_insert
tools.description: Insert a new paragraph before or after an existing one, copying its formatting. Modifies document.

tools.name: download
tools.description: Save the edited document to a specified path on your local filesystem. Writes to disk.

tools.name: get_session_status
tools.description: Check the status of the current editing session. Read-only operation.
